# SensCode

> Premium, hand-coded web design and development by Christian Sparks — a USMC veteran-owned studio in Yuma, Arizona. Every site is built from scratch in vanilla HTML, CSS, and JavaScript: no frameworks, no templates, no drag-and-drop builders. The result is sub-second load times, full ownership of the codebase, and a visual identity tailored to the client rather than a starter kit.

SensCode is a one-person studio. Christian Sparks (Founder & Lead Engineer) handles discovery, design, development, and delivery directly — there are no project managers, agencies, or middle layers. Clients own every line of code at the end of the engagement.

## Services

- [Full Scope Web Development](https://senscode.com/services): End-to-end builds covering custom UI/UX design, full-stack development, responsive mobile layouts, and SEO/performance tuning. Starts at $1,000.
- [Technical Consulting](https://senscode.com/services): Architecture planning, technology stack selection, code review and audits, scalability strategy. Starts at $500 plus hourly.
- [Website Repair & Modernization](https://senscode.com/services): Performance optimization, bug fixes and refactoring, design modernization, accessibility compliance. Starts at $300.
- Veteran discount: 15% off all services for active-duty military and veterans, honor system.

## Pages

- [Home](https://senscode.com/): Studio overview and core principles (personalized, style, versatile).
- [Services](https://senscode.com/services): Full service catalog, hand-coded vs. drag-and-drop comparison, project estimator, FAQ.
- [About](https://senscode.com/about): Founder background, philosophy, and engineering principles.
- [Portfolio](https://senscode.com/portfolio): Case studies and digital experiments.
- [Contact](https://senscode.com/contact): Project inquiry form. Replies within 24 hours.
- [Privacy Policy](https://senscode.com/privacy)
- [Terms of Use](https://senscode.com/terms)

## Operating details

- Location: Yuma, Arizona, United States
- Service area: Remote / worldwide
- Founder: Christian Sparks (USMC veteran)
- Legal entity: Sensormedia LLC, doing business as SensCode
- Stack philosophy: Vanilla HTML, CSS, JavaScript — no React, no Vue, no static-site frameworks
- Typical project timeline: 3–6 weeks for full-scope builds
- Hosting: Deploys to Vercel, Netlify, or any host the client prefers; clients keep the credentials
